title: eryngium caffirum
intro: Eryngium caffirum, also known as the Cape eryngo, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Eryngium caffirum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Eryngium caffirum include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
